title: Mastering `font-display`: Boost Web Font Performance & UI Experience
tweet: Eliminate FOIT & enhance #UserExperience! Learn how `font-display: swap;` revolutionizes #WebFonts loading for superior #CSS_typography & #UI_design. Read the expert tip! #webdev
tip: For optimal #UserExperience with #WebFonts, eliminate the 'flash of invisible text' (FOIT) by leveraging `font-display: swap;` in your `@font-face` rules. This CSS typography property ensures your content remains readable with a fallback font immediately, then seamlessly swaps to your preferred web font once loaded. This significantly boosts perceived performance, making your #UI_design feel faster and more responsive, especially on slower connections. It's a non-negotiable for modern web development.
